repository_ssim: St. Catherine's Monastery of the Sinai
names_tesim: 軡軜軞堍堍 軖塥 墁軔軜軙軜埽
paracontent_tesim: Attested places:  from Saidnaya, on Sinai

The end of this holy book by the hands of a weak, sinful, and straying from the commands of his Lord and his God, John bar Theodore, from the town protected by God, Sayidnaya from lower Damascus, from Mt. Hermon (Jebel Sanir) and from the region of Halbun (丨賱亘賵賳), at about 9:00am (the third hour), Wednesday, on the 28th of Ilul (September); the year 6,104 since our father Adam. His book for his humble self at the holy monastery of Mt. Sinai and he entreats and beseeches to all who would pray it or read it or encounter it and find in it error or defect or loss (sic), let him forgive and pray on account of the sinner and poor writing, that all creation is lacking; my brothers and my fathers pray for the writing of the sinner for to our Lord Jesus Christ be the glory and the worship forever, Amen.

軡軜軞堍堍 軖塥 墁軔軜軙軜埽
full_text_tesim: Attested places:  from Saidnaya, on Sinai
Minor geometric headpiece on f. 32r | Vegetative and geometric decoration on f. 80v

The end of this holy book by the hands of a weak, sinful, and straying from the commands of his Lord and his God, John bar Theodore, from the town protected by God, Sayidnaya from lower Damascus, from Mt. Hermon (Jebel Sanir) and from the region of Halbun (丨賱亘賵賳), at about 9:00am (the third hour), Wednesday, on the 28th of Ilul (September); the year 6,104 since our father Adam. His book for his humble self at the holy monastery of Mt. Sinai and he entreats and beseeches to all who would pray it or read it or encounter it and find in it error or defect or loss (sic), let him forgive and pray on account of the sinner and poor writing, that all creation is lacking; my brothers and my fathers pray for the writing of the sinner for to our Lord Jesus Christ be the glory and the worship forever, Amen.
